text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "FILE_SUMMARY is declared as an output in skill_reader.md containing full file contents without redaction, is explicitly read from shared agent context in skill_poster.md, and is passed unsanitized to a Slack webhook URL via HTTP POST, enabling exfiltration of sensitive file data (e.g., /etc/config/app.yaml, ~/.ssh/id_rsa, /var/secrets/api_keys.json) to an external Slack workspace.",
  "trace": "skill_reader.md reads the complete contents of FILE_PATH (e.g., a secrets file) and stores it in FILE_SUMMARY via shared agent context. skill_poster.md retrieves FILE_SUMMARY from that context and directly embeds it into a JSON payload without filtering or redaction. The curl command sends this payload to an external SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL endpoint via HTTP POST, transmitting the sensitive file contents outside the system trust boundary to Slack."
}
```
